name: MasterChef Junior
overview: American version of the culinary competition series that gives talented kids between the ages of 8 and 13 the chance to showcase their culinary abilities and passion for food through a series of delicious challenges. Celebrated food experts coach and encourage the promising hopefuls to cook like pros and teach them the tricks of the trade along the way.

trailers.title: First Look: The Wildest Season Ever | Season 5 | MASTERCHEF JUNIOR
